intent: 补 fulltest 没覆盖的真实场景深度测试: 规模/多人共享/sync实跑/失败路径/跨客户端真运行/冷启动/性能定量/6 candidate收口/剩余冷评/fix真app复验. LIBERAL capture延续.
goal: 10扇深度门各达成或诚实标needs-real-env; confirmed bug修+验; 回归绿

in_scope: fulltest诚实盘点的7宏观+微观洞
造合成大语料/2 clone模拟多人/真remote sync
LIBERAL capture: 像bug/设计疑惑/efficacy弱全记
constraints: 跨客户端若无法全自动须诚实标needs-real-client不假装
造的合成语料用完清理不污染真库
sync/push真remote操作前确认安全(synthetic store)

execution_criteria: 每continue取一扇门→deterministic实跑(造语料/模拟多人/真sync/注入失败)→观测→confirmed bug进findings+修
L-PARTIAL门(跨客户端)诚实标simulability, 不能全自动的标needs-real-client浮用户
每wave收口commit; 回归门必绿

task_decomposition.subject: status不再对已装项目误报'(not a Fabric project)'
task_decomposition.done_when: is_fabric_project信号+(unset)标签; 测试绿; dev-build复验

findings.expectation_source: 高频MCP工具应亚秒级返回
findings.actual: planContext ranking O(N)遍历全候选~0.5ms/条; recall latency线性增长 748ms@1000/2802ms@2000
findings.note: perf-characteristic非正确性defect; 典型KB≪1000条(真pcf~57); 优化deferred超deeptest边界

findings.actual: install从不写project_id; status.ts用?? '(not a Fabric project)' → 每个已装项目误报

verify.evidence: 冷启动install后config无project_id; 真pcf亦无

findings.actual: meta-builder默认must_read_if镜像summary(line1076/1127); 仅作者显式写frontmatter才区分
findings.note: confirmed-as-design优雅回落; efficacy弱非defect; 无fix

findings.expectation_source: store list标签应反映真实git remote
findings.actual: local_only源自global-config metadata(s.remote===undefined)非实际git remote; personal store真有remote却标'(仅本地)'

verify.evidence: fabric-global.json personal remote ABSENT但store git remote=fabric-store-personal-pcf.git

findings.note: root cause=store-remote config追踪缺口=deferred global-refactor(S系列); 尊重边界不越界feature实现

findings.expectation_source: sync命令声称'Pull--rebase+push every mounted store'
findings.actual: run-sync.ts execFileSync git仅pull--rebase(L124)+rebase continue/abort(L165); 无任何git push; walkPending只pull; 报synced却本地1-ahead永不外传

verify.evidence: A commit后sync报synced但origin/main...HEAD=0 1; remote跨多次sync不变; grep全文0个git push

findings.note: CRITICAL静默知识非传播; deferred global-refactor sync核心; fix=实现push I/O=feature实现, 按边界defer+升needs_adjudication

findings.actual: storeCreate(store-ops.ts:89-91)只把remote写入config metadata, 从不git remote add; git remote -v空 → fabric sync对该store永远无法pull/push

verify.evidence: store create --remote后git remote -v空; sync报'无法读取远程仓库'; grep无git remote add

findings.note: 同F14架构根(config remote⊥git origin); deferred global-refactor store-remote wiring

findings.expectation_source: sync应优雅处理未提交编辑
findings.actual: sync对脏工作树跑pull--rebase报raw git'请提交或贮藏'(exit0+指引); 知识commit预期由lifecycle做
findings.note: likely by-design git hygiene; 但raw git msg未fabric-framed

findings.expectation_source: MCP工具应优雅降级而非抛裸错
findings.actual: corrupt/missing agents.meta→recall re-throw(recall.ts:109-111)描述性错; meta-reader.ts:22/35无remediation指引(无'run doctor --fix')

verify.evidence: FP2/FP3 recall THREW; 错误msg描述性但无修复指引

findings.note: 非静默损坏(好); 仅缺remediation hint; doctor能检测+offer--fix; polish非correctness, 不修

findings.actual: defaultPull offline regex(run-sync.ts:138-143)仅匹配英文git错误; 本地化git的'无法读取远程仓库'(file-remote丢失)不匹配→落generic error。SSH host不可达=英文不受影响

verify.evidence: nonexistent local .git+zh locale→raw error; unreachable SSH host→offline两locale都对

findings.note: 窄边界(file-remote+localized); 常见网络故障SSH正常; sync-area deferred

findings.expectation_source: narrow path-anchored条目应在匹配路径可靠surface
findings.actual: narrow条目未获选择优先级: 小语料(<24budget)对所有路径都冒(无path-gate); 大语料(300)即使编辑exact-match路径也被密集broad挤出候选池(BM25输)

verify.evidence: KT-PIT-7777 proven+narrow+src/auth/**: 20条corpus所有路径冒/300条corpus匹配路径也narrow:0

findings.note: 呼应KT-PIT-9105 narrow从未真正激活+candidate-pool A1/A2/A6 injection❌; fix=injection优先级redesign=feature, defer injection infra

findings.actual: maturity 'endorsed'被schema enum[draft,verified,proven]拒(api-contracts.ts:38)→条目静默skip; 但fabric-config.ts引用endorsed(orphan_demote_endorsed_days)。vocab不一致

verify.evidence: KT-PIT-9101 maturity:endorsed→'unknown maturity endorsed; skipping'; config有orphan_demote_endorsed_days

findings.note: config vocab⊥schema enum; KT-PIT-9101是dogfood fixture但真endorsed条目会被丢

findings.actual: terse SKILL.md+on-demand ref/*.md(progressive disclosure); 可遵循性依赖agent真load Read-links; 冷评reviewer跳过ref链接→判skill underspecified(其'ref缺失'声明经核验REFUTED, 文件存在)

verify.evidence: 2 cold eval review/import 2/5; 但核验ref/phase-2-mining.md 17.5KB存在→'缺失'声明refuted; 真风险=link-following纪律

findings.note: 非缺文件bug; mitigation=inline高风险决策表进SKILL.md或硬性ref-load precondition

findings.expectation_source: fabric store/sync 命令存在 → 暗示 multi-store 知识共享可用
findings.actual: multi-store 知识流三处全未接线: (1)写入路径从不写 store(只写项目.fabric+全局personal, storeRelativePath仅用于sync/doctor/create); (2)recall/meta从不读mounted store(server零import loadGlobalConfig); (3)sync零git push(F-SYNC-NOPUSH)。实证: 挂载的team store 61条知识, recall在pcf只返9条项目自有, store条目0命中。只有mount元数据+pull空壳能用

verify.evidence: grep loadGlobalConfig/required_stores在server零结果; recall(pcf)=9条全项目自有 vs team store 61条; storeRelativePath无写知识用途

findings.note: SUPERSEDES/扩展 F-SYNC-NOPUSH+F-SYNC-REMOTE+F14为同一根因: multi-store层是scaffolding(CLI壳先造)读写推集成未做。BY design-status(global-refactor北极星未实现)非regression; 但命令'假装能用'(store add+sync报synced)给false confidence=最危险。当前真实工作模型=dual-root co-location(KT-DEC-0003)。fix=global-refactor goal整套接线; 止血=未接线警告(本turn B)

ship_criteria.name: G-SCALE
ship_criteria.desc: 大语料行为: 造/载 1000s 条 → 验 BM25 排序区分度/top_k/payload预算/上下文溢出/延迟
ship_criteria.target: ≥1000条语料下 ranking区分+payload截断+延迟测得
ship_criteria.actual: ≥1000条实测: ranking区分confirmed(top6=query-topic auth/render/db@1000); payload截断恒定(returned~24/omitted 976@1000/1976@2000/~21-24KB); 无溢出。证据.scratchpad/g-scale-perf-evidence.md

ship_criteria.name: G-MULTIUSER
ship_criteria.desc: 团队共享真旅程: bind team store→模拟2开发者(2 clone/2 uid)→A写push→B pull→B recall搜到
ship_criteria.target: 端到端共享回路实跑通或gap
ship_criteria.actual: 端到端共享回路实跑通(2 isolated FABRIC_HOME+真bare remote): A写KT-DEC-9001→push→remote→B clone+store add+sync pull→B拿到。机制sound; CLI birth-path gap=F-SYNC-REMOTE。证据.scratchpad/g-multiuser-sync-evidence.md

ship_criteria.name: G-SYNC
ship_criteria.desc: fabric sync 实际 pull--rebase+push + 冲突恢复(--continue/--abort)
ship_criteria.target: sync实跑+制造冲突验恢复; 复查F57/F58面
ship_criteria.actual: sync实跑+冲突恢复全验: pull--rebase✓/conflict-pause✓/--abort✓/--continue✓(线性史+resolution应用)。但push完全未实现=F-SYNC-NOPUSH CRITICAL(报synced却0 push, run-sync.ts无git push)。F57/F58面superseded

ship_criteria.name: G-FAILPATH
ship_criteria.desc: 失败/降级路径: 损坏agents.meta/events.jsonl、断网sync、git冲突、磁盘满模拟
ship_criteria.target: 各降级路径观测到优雅处理或记bug
ship_criteria.actual: 注入7路径: corrupt events.jsonl/bad-md frontmatter/read-only .fabric → recall优雅存活(24 rules)✓; corrupt/missing agents.meta→recall抛描述性错(无doctor--fix指引)但doctor检测+offer--fix✓; offline sync(SSH不可达)→分类offline+push延后优雅✓; 边界:本地化file-remote offline窄边误分类。disk-full未模拟(低ROI)

ship_criteria.name: G-CROSSCLIENT
ship_criteria.desc: Codex/Cursor真实运行(非仅配置): 在各客户端真触发hook/MCP观测
ship_criteria.sim: L-PARTIAL(需真Codex/Cursor session, 诚实标可能无法全自动)
ship_criteria.actual: PARTIAL诚实: 脚本级真触发验证(4 hooks byte-identical×3端; broad hook执行产真banner; plan-context-hint工作; 全hook exec无crash; codex MCP wired~/.codex). APP级真session触发(真Codex/Cursor运行时调hook/MCP)=needs-real-client不假装. 证据.scratchpad/g-crossclient-coldstart-evidence.md

ship_criteria.name: G-COLDSTART
ship_criteria.desc: 全新用户冷启动: clone干净repo→fabric install→第一次用 端到端体验
ship_criteria.actual: fresh repo→install --yes(bootstrap121/mcp4/hooks2全OK)→status→recall(空KB正确)旅程实走; gap记录: F9(已修)+required_stores空+全局codex MCP路径共享. 体验功能完整

ship_criteria.name: G-PERF
ship_criteria.desc: 定量性能: recall/plan_context/doctor 延迟+token+内存测量(非定性)
ship_criteria.target: 关键路径延迟/payload字节实测
ship_criteria.actual: 定量@1000: readAgentsMeta 28ms/planContext 513ms(瓶颈O(N) ~0.5ms/候选)/recall 781ms; RSS 149MB; meta 1MB/1000条; latency 11ms@10→748@1000→2802@2000线性

ship_criteria.name: G-CANDIDATE-CLOSE
ship_criteria.actual: 6/6终verdict: F9 confirmed→FIXED(+test+devbuild复验), F14 confirmed→defer global-refactor, F13 confirmed-as-design, F5/F15/F17 refuted。证据.scratchpad/g-candidate-fix-evidence.md

ship_criteria.name: G-EFFICACY-2
ship_criteria.desc: 剩余L-LLM面冷评: fabric-review/import可遵循性、narrow注入质量、条目description质量
ship_criteria.actual: ≥2零上下文冷评(cross-vendor maestro env-hung→fallback 2 Claude零上下文Agent diverse lens). 收敛: 知识surfacing efficacy弱1-2/5(description区分力1/5+narrow注入1/5, deterministic F13/F-NARROW-BUDGET独立印证). skill可遵循性: 冷评"ref缺失"声明VERIFIED-REFUTED(ref/*.md存在17KB), tempered为progressive-disclosure link-following风险F-SKILL-PROGRESSIVE. 证据.scratchpad/g-efficacy2-evidence.md

ship_criteria.name: G-FIX-REVERIFY
ship_criteria.desc: 4个已修bug(F8/F11/F18/F10)在dev build真app跑确认生效(非仅单测)
ship_criteria.actual: 4/4 dev-build行为复验: F8 doctor 0假阳性/F11 zh-CN-hybrid无placeholder warn/F18 schema.optional parse成功/F10 scope-explain友好usage。非仅单测

needs_adjudication.question: fabric sync的push半边完全未实现(CRITICAL静默知识非传播)。fix=实现git push I/O = deferred v2.1 global-refactor sync核心feature。是否拉进本deeptest goal修, 还是留给global-refactor(① maestro impl)goal?
needs_adjudication.recommendation: 留global-refactor goal(尊重边界'严禁越界功能实现'+global-refactor是下一独立goal); 但优先级应提到该goal最高(headline feature broken)

git_commits.subject: fix(status): F9 不再误报 not-a-Fabric-project

loop_exit_status.terminate_reason: all-10-ship-criteria-met (G-CROSSCLIENT honest-partial: app-level needs-real-client; G-EFFICACY-2 fallback to zero-context Claude evals, cross-vendor maestro env-hung)
loop_exit_status.summary: 10门全达成。confirmed bug F9修+测+回归绿(2232 passed). 12 findings(含CRITICAL F-SYNC-NOPUSH=sync从不push已升needs_adjudication, HIGH F-SYNC-REMOTE, medium F-NARROW-BUDGET/F13/F-SKILL-PROGRESSIVE/F14). 6/6 candidate终verdict. 4/4 fix dev-build复验. sync/store-remote/injection-efficacy类findings按边界defer global-refactor/injection infra. needs-real-client(真Codex/Cursor session)+cross-vendor冷评(maestro env)诚实标.

regression_status: GREEN: shared 568 + server 773 + cli 891 = 2232 passed/0 failed @ test/fabric-deeptest(F9修后)
